response: "the night is young and the stars are bright, the wind is low and the snow is light, the moon is full and the earth is still, the silence is deep and the world is wide. the child is here and the fire is warm, the heart is full and the spirit is free. the daughter of the night is born, the daughter of the dawn is born, the daughter of the sky is born, the daughter of the earth is born. the daughter of the night is born, the daughter of the dawn is born, the daughter of the sky is born, the daughter of the earth is born."
